title: eryngium argyreum
intro: Eryngium argyreum, also known as silver glow or silvery sea holly, is a perennial flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to mountainous regions of western North America. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Eryngium argyreum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially supporting the immune system and reducing oxidative stress. Eryngium argyreum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
